# AI Premium Shop (AIPS) — llms.txt
# Bangladesh trusted AI subscription marketplace
# 3,000+ customers since 2024. 86 products, 41 brands, 8 categories.

## Site
domain: aipremiumshop.com
canonical: https://aipremiumshop.com
description: Premium AI tools in Bangladesh from ৳299/mo. ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, Gemini, Freepik, Windsurf & 80+ more. bKash/Nagad. 5-15 min delivery.
